children.text: was a minor or employed in a learner’s capacity at the time of injury; and
was not physically or mentally handicapped before the injury;

children.label: b
children.text: If an individual without good cause fails to apply for and undergo vocational rehabilitation when so directed under , the Secretary, on review under and after finding that in the absence of the failure the wage-earning capacity of the individual would probably have substantially increased, may reduce prospectively the monetary compensation of the individual in accordance with what would probably have been his wage-earning capacity in the absence of the failure, until the individual in good faith complies with the direction of the Secretary.section 8104 of this titlesection 8128 of this title
